vulnerability.reference: Security analysts trusting gradient-based explanations for robustness assessment may miss actual attack surfaces.
vulnerability.generated: Analysts rely on gradient-based saliency maps without ground-truth fidelity checks, creating blind trust.

impact.reference: Deployment of classifiers susceptible to adversarial attacks, compromising system security and data integrity.
impact.generated: Deployed classifiers harbor undetected adversarial weaknesses, enabling real-world evasion attacks.

dose_response.reference: Attribution maps lacking fidelity mislead security analysts, causing over-trust in gradient-based explanations for robustness, failing to reveal attack surfaces, and leading to deployment of adversarially vulnerable classifiers compromising security.
dose_response.generated: Attribution map explanations lacking fidelity and clarity, through security analysts evaluating DNN robustness with gradient-based explanations, trigger blind trust in saliency maps without ground-truth checks, leading to deployed classifiers harboring undetected adversarial weaknesses and enabling evasion attacks.
